title: HIV COMMUNITY TEST SITE - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HIV COMMUNITY TEST SITE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides anonymous and confidential HIV, hepatitis C, and syphilis testing. HIV testing is done by taking a blood or oral sample, with rapid 20-minute test results available for those who qualify. Results are available by phone or in person. Condoms and other safe sex supplies also available. Offers HIV prevention counseling and PrEP (PRe Exposure Prophylaxis) navigation. 619 NW 6th Avenue Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: -Standard HIV test: Unrestricted -Rapid HIV test: Men who have or have had sex with men, injection drug users, and partners of people living with HIV -Hepatitis C test: Any individual with a history of injection drug use -Syphilis test: Men who have sex with men, trans folks who may be at risk Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4:30pm Test Results Line: Monday-Friday 1:30pm-4pm Email (503) 988-3700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 988-3700 Test Results Line (503) 988-5727 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment. Some walk-ins accepted, but appointments are preferred. FEES: -HIV test: $50 (no one will be refused service due to inability to pay) -Hepatitis C test: $20, some free testing services available -Syphilis test: None -Condoms and safe sex supplies: None DOCUMENTS: Call fo rinformation LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Community Immunization Clinic is located on the 6th floor Services: AIDS/HIV Prevention Counseling Hepatitis Testing HIV Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening * Syphilis Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - SYRINGE DISPOSAL HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - STD CLINIC HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE PUBLIC SAFETY - MEDICATION & FIREARM SAFETY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT
